allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(apk\): resolve black screen + login flow for Capacitor Android

- Convert dynamic @capacitor/* imports to static \(were hanging unbundled\)
- Replace next/script in YouTubeContext with vanilla IFrame API loader
- Merge duplicated build blocks in vite.config.ts, target es2019
- Replace unsafe ''process.env'': ''import.meta.env'' define with per-key injection
- Add GlobalErrorBoundary + AuthGuard + visible LoadingSpinner
- Fix GardenLayout to use <Outlet /> instead of undefined children prop
- Remove orphaned Next.js residuals \(_app.tsx, server.ts\)
- Purge legacy service workers and caches on boot to unblock APK interactions
- Remove React.StrictMode to avoid doubled event listeners in WebView
- Add default-avatar.png/svg placeholders
- Add public/auth/callback bridge page for OAuth deep link on Android
- Switch native OAuth redirect to HTTPS bridge \(joinspacely.com/auth/callback\)
EOF
\)")
